novel_features.name: Construction Leads
novel_features.description: Surface recent construction contract award winners as B2B outreach candidates — company name, project location, contract value, and construction type — so you can contact winners who need construction machinery.

novel_features.name: Win Rate Analysis
novel_features.description: See what fraction of contract competitions in a market go to new winners vs. incumbents — your real odds before writing a proposal.

novel_features.name: Opportunity Scorer
novel_features.description: Get a ranked shortlist of open tenders scored by deadline urgency, contract value, keyword fit, and market openness — your morning briefing, prioritized.

novel_features.name: Market Concentration
novel_features.description: Compute which companies capture what share of awarded contract value in a sector and country, with HHI score and year-over-year trend.

novel_features.name: Procurement Velocity
novel_features.description: See whether a procurement market is heating up, cooling off, or spiking — weekly notice count trends over rolling windows vs. same period last year.

novel_features.name: Dark Buyers Detector
novel_features.description: Surface contracting authorities whose calls-for-tender rarely produce public awards, or whose awards show suspiciously low winner diversity — a compliance and integrity signal.

novel_features.name: CPV Drift
novel_features.description: See which procurement categories are growing or shrinking in a country's spending mix year-over-year — essential for platform builders and policy researchers.

novel_features.name: Buyer Profile
novel_features.description: Build a full procurement dossier on any contracting authority: their spending cadence, CPV mix, typical contract values, and repeat winner patterns.

novel_features.name: Deadline Heat
novel_features.description: A ranked calendar of expiring tenders weighted by urgency × value / competition density — your daily prioritized view of what needs attention now.
